case_title: GERALD KEYS VS. STARVING STUDENTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEYS, GERALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS, INC. $2,502.00 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,564.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO STARVING STUDENTS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEYS, GERALD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY STARVING STUDENTS, INC. SET FOR JUL-24-2009 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF KEYS, GERALD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY STARVING STUDENTS, INC.
